name: Qualified-Pipeline-Coverage (QPC)
description: The ratio of 'Risk-Adjusted-Pipeline-Value' to 'Period-Revenue-Target', filtered by 'Evidence-Fidelity' and 'Ideal-Customer-Profile (ICP)' alignment.
goalMapping: Verifies that 'Demand-Generation-Logic' is sufficient to hit 'Growth-Sprints' without over-leveraging 'Operational-Burn'.
